Caption: Experimental extraction curves of grape pomace at different temperatures under agitation (20°C AG, 35°C AG, 50°C AG) and acoustic (20°C US, 35°C US, 50°C US) conditions, for total phenolic content (A) and antioxidant capacity according to ABTS (B) and FRAP (C) assays.
Simulated vs. experimental total phenolic content (TP) of the extracts, for experiments carried out with agitation (A) and with the application of ultrasound (B) at different temperatures.
Simulated vs. experimental antioxidant capacity of the extracts (ABTS assay), for experiments carried out with agitation (A) and with the application of ultrasound (B) at different temperatures.
Simulated vs. experimental antioxidant capacity of the extracts (FRAP assay), for experiments carried out with agitation (A) and with the application of ultrasound (B) at different temperatures.
